title: BrikByteOS Verdict v0
description: Canonical final release-level decision contract for BrikByteOS after policy evaluation has completed.

decided_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp indicating when the final release decision was produced.

environment.description: Target environment or release context to which the verdict applies.

target_id.description: Optional stable identifier for the release candidate, build, deployment target, or evaluation unit.

decision_context.description: Final-decision context only. This must identify where the release decision applies.

evaluated_count.description: Total number of policy evaluations considered in this release decision.

failed_count.description: Total number of failed policy evaluations contributing to the release decision.

warning_count.description: Total number of warning-level policy evaluations contributing to the release decision.

passed_count.description: Optional number of passed policy evaluations when explicitly useful for downstream consumers.

policy_summary.description: Release-level rollup of policy outcomes only. This summary must not embed full policy result objects.

policy_result_set_ref.description: Reference or identifier for the set of policy evaluation results used to compute the verdict.

normalized_result_set_ref.description: Optional reference or identifier for the normalized evidence set used upstream.

audit_bundle_ref.description: Optional future-facing reference for audit bundle linkage without embedding the bundle itself.

traceability.description: References to lower-layer artifacts for audit and traceability. Full lower-layer payloads are not embedded here.
